question_tagalog: Sure ka ba na ako lang?
question_english: Are you sure it's only me?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang, wala nang iba.
quote_english: Only you, no one else.

question_tagalog: Hindi ka ba nagsasawa sakin?
question_english: Don't you get tired of me?
quote_tagalog: Di ako magsasawa sayo kahit kailan.
quote_english: I'll never get tired of you.

question_tagalog: Anong gagawin mo pag nagtampo ako?
question_english: What will you do if I sulk?
quote_tagalog: Susuyuin kita palagi.
quote_english: I will always win you back.

question_tagalog: Love mo pa rin ba ako kahit ang kulit ko?
question_english: Do you still love me even if I'm annoying?
quote_tagalog: Mas mahal kita dahil makulit ka.
quote_english: I love you more because of your quirks.

question_tagalog: Promise mo ba na di mo ko iiwan?
question_english: Do you promise not to leave me?
quote_tagalog: Dito lang ako palagi sa tabi mo.
quote_english: I will always be right here beside you.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ko papakalmahin pag overthinker mode ako?
question_english: How will you calm me down when I overthink?
quote_tagalog: Yayakapin kita nang mahigpit.
quote_english: I will hug you tight.

question_tagalog: Ano yung pinakagusto mo sa pagiging tayo?
question_english: What do you like most about us being together?
quote_tagalog: Masaya ako kasi ikaw yung kasama ko.
quote_english: I'm happy because I'm with you.

question_tagalog: Pag nag-away tayo, babatiin mo ba ko agad?
question_english: If we fight, will you make up with me right away?
quote_tagalog: Di ko kayang matiis ka.
quote_english: I can't bear to ignore you.

question_tagalog: Tingin mo ba forever na tayo?
question_english: Do you think we'll be together forever?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang yung future na gusto ko.
quote_english: You are the only future I want.

question_tagalog: Anong ginagawa ko na nafi-feel mong mahal kita?
question_english: What do I do that makes you feel loved?
quote_tagalog: Ramdam ko ang love mo sa mga simple effort mo.
quote_english: I feel your love in your simple efforts.

question_tagalog: Di ka ba naiinis pag ang clingy ko?
question_english: Don't you get annoyed when I'm clingy?
quote_tagalog: Gusto kong maging clingy ka sakin.
quote_english: I love it when you're clingy with me.

question_tagalog: Pano kung in preparation, pumangit ako, love mo pa rin ba ko?
question_english: What if I get ugly, will you still love me?
quote_tagalog: Para sakin, ikaw palagi ang pinakamaganda.
quote_english: For me, you will always be the most beautiful.

question_tagalog: Anong naiisip mo pag tahimik ako?
question_english: What do you think when I'm quiet?
quote_tagalog: Gusto lang kitang alagaan pag ganun.
quote_english: I just want to take care of you then.

question_tagalog: Gano mo ko kamahal from 1 to 10?
question_english: How much do you love me from 1 to 10?
quote_tagalog: Lampas sa ten yung love ko sayo.
quote_english: My love for you goes beyond ten.

question_tagalog: Pano kita napapasaya pag sad ka?
question_english: How do I make you happy when you're sad?
quote_tagalog: Makita lang kita, okay na ko.
quote_english: Just seeing you makes me okay.

question_tagalog: Sure ka bang ako yung the one mo?
question_english: Are you sure I am your 'the one'?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang ang sagot sa prayers ko.
quote_english: You are the only answer to my prayers.

question_tagalog: Anong unang gagawin mo pag nagkita tayo ulit?
question_english: What's the first thing you'll do when we see each other again?
quote_tagalog: Miss na miss na kita.
quote_english: I miss you so much.

question_tagalog: Anong word yung makakapag-describe sakin for you?
question_english: What word describes me for you?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw ang pinakamagandang blessing ko.
quote_english: You are my greatest blessing.

question_tagalog: Ano yung pinaka-na-appreciate mo na ginawa ko today?
question_english: What did you appreciate most that I did today?
quote_tagalog: Thankful ako sayo every single day.
quote_english: I am thankful for you every single day.

question_tagalog: Pano mo pinapakita na proud ka na ako yung partner mo?
question_english: How do you show you're proud to have me as your partner?
quote_tagalog: Ipinagmamalaki ko sa lahat na akin ka.
quote_english: I proudly tell everyone that you are mine.

question_tagalog: Love mo ba ko kahit madalas akong topakin?
question_english: Do you love me even if I often have mood swings?
quote_tagalog: Tanggap ko lahat sayo, pati sumpong mo.
quote_english: I accept everything about you, even your mood swings.

question_tagalog: Pano mo kino-comfort yung sarili mo pag miss mo ko?
question_english: How do you comfort yourself when you miss me?
quote_tagalog: Tinitingnan ko picture natin pag miss kita.
quote_english: I look at our pictures when I miss you.

question_tagalog: Ano yung paborito mong part ng araw natin together?
question_english: What's your favorite part of our day together?
quote_tagalog: Favorite ko lahat ng oras na kasama kita.
quote_english: My favorite is all the time I spend with you.

question_tagalog: Minsan ba naisip mong give up na lang?
question_english: Have you ever thought of giving up?
quote_tagalog: Hinding-hindi ko bibitawan yung kamay mo.
quote_english: I will never let go of your hand.

question_tagalog: Kung may babaguhin ka sakin, ano yun?
question_english: If you could change something about me, what would it be?
quote_tagalog: Perfect ka na para sakin, wag ka na magbago.
quote_english: You are already perfect to me, don't change.

question_tagalog: Natatakot ka bang mawala ako?
question_english: Are you afraid of losing me?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang yung gusto kong makasama habang buhay.
quote_english: You are the only one I want to be with.

question_tagalog: Ano yung nagpapatibay satin aside sa love?
question_english: What makes us strong besides love?
quote_tagalog: Mag-bestfriend din tayo eh.
quote_english: We are best friends too.

question_tagalog: Pano mo alam na genuine yung feelings natin sa isa't isa?
question_english: How do you know our feelings are genuine?
quote_tagalog: Ramdam ko sa mga tingin mo sakin.
quote_english: I feel it in the way you look at me.

question_tagalog: Pag naging busy tayo, papansinin mo pa rin ba ko?
question_english: When we get busy, will you still give me attention?
quote_tagalog: Gagawan ko palagi ng time para sayo.
quote_english: I will always make time for you.

question_tagalog: Anong reassurance ang gusto mong marinig sakin lagi?
question_english: What reassurance do you always want to hear from me?
quote_tagalog: Gusto kong lagi mong sinasabi na mahal mo ko.
quote_english: I want you to always say you love me.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo nararamdamang safe ka sakin?
question_english: When do you feel safe with me?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw yung safe place ko.
quote_english: You are my safe place.

question_tagalog: Ano yung unang reason bakit ka nag-stay sakin?
question_english: What's the main reason you stayed with me?
quote_tagalog: Iba ka sa lahat ng nakilala ko.
quote_english: You are different from everyone I've met.

question_tagalog: Naniniwala ka bang mag-work out talaga tayo in the end?
question_english: Do you believe we will really work out in the end?
quote_tagalog: Lalaban tayo nang sabay kaya magwo-work 'to.
quote_english: We will fight together so this will work.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ha-handle pag may time na cold ako?
question_english: How will you handle it when there are times I'm cold?
quote_tagalog: Paiinitin natin ulit yung love natin.
quote_english: We will warm up our love again.

question_tagalog: Anong sweet message yung di mo makalimutan from me?
question_english: What sweet message of mine can't you forget?
quote_tagalog: Palagi kong binabasa yung mga lumang chats natin.
quote_english: I always read our old chats.

question_tagalog: Ano yung pinaka tina-treasure mong binigay ko sayo?
question_english: What's the most treasured thing I gave you?
quote_tagalog: Yung love mo ang the best gift of all.
quote_english: Your love is the best gift of all.

question_tagalog: Ano yung palagi mong pinapagpray for us?
question_english: What do you always pray for us?
quote_tagalog: Pinagdadasal ko na sana tayo na hanggang dulo.
quote_english: I pray that we stay together until the end.

question_tagalog: Bakit ako yung pinili mong mahalin?
question_english: Why did you choose to love me?
quote_tagalog: Nahanap ko sayo yung matagal ko nang hinahanap.
quote_english: I found in you what I've been looking for.

question_tagalog: Ano yung palagi mong naiisip randomly pag bored ka?
question_english: What do you always randomly think about when bored?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw agad nasa isip ko pag bakante ako.
quote_english: You're instantly on my mind when I'm free.

question_tagalog: Kung may doubt ako ngayon sakin, anong sasabihin mo?
question_english: If I have doubts about myself now, what would you say?
quote_tagalog: Wag kang mag-doubt, andito ako para support sayo.
quote_english: Don't doubt yourself, I'm here to support you.

question_tagalog: Pano mo idi-deal pag na-burnout ako?
question_english: How will you deal with it when I get burnt out?
quote_tagalog: Magpapahinga tayo together.
quote_english: We will rest together.

question_tagalog: Ano yung naging paboritong habit mo dahil sakin?
question_english: What became your favorite habit because of me?
quote_tagalog: Napapangiti mo ko kahit wala lang.
quote_english: You make me smile even over nothing.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ba naaalagaan yung kilig natin para di mawala?
question_english: How do you maintain our sparks so they don't fade?
quote_tagalog: Kikiligin ako sayo araw-araw.
quote_english: I will have butterflies for you every day.

question_tagalog: Kung iiwan kita sa bahay mag-isa, ano unang gagawin mo?
question_english: If I leave you home alone, what's the first thing you'll do?
quote_tagalog: Tatawagan agad kita kasi miss kita.
quote_english: I will call you right away because I miss you.

question_tagalog: Nagseselos ka ba kahit walang reason minsan?
question_english: Do you get jealous sometimes even without a reason?
quote_tagalog: Normal lang yun kasi love kita.
quote_english: That's just normal because I love you.

question_tagalog: Pano mo naha-handle yung topak ko madaling araw?
question_english: How do you handle my moods in the middle of the night?
quote_tagalog: Kahit inaantok, sasamahan kita.
quote_english: Even if I'm sleepy, I'll stay with you.

question_tagalog: Ano yung kanta na eksaktong-eksakto sa feeling mo sakin ngayon?
question_english: What song exactly matches your feeling for me right now?
quote_tagalog: Kanta natin ang theme song ng buhay ko.
quote_english: Our song is the theme of my life.

question_tagalog: Nag-iiba ba tingin mo sakin pag hindi ako nakapag-ayos?
question_english: Do you look at me differently when I'm not dressed up?
quote_tagalog: Kahit bagong gising ka, ang cute mo pa rin.
quote_english: Even just waking up, you're still cute.

question_tagalog: Kung 1 day bawal tayong mag-usap, pano mo ko mamimiss?
question_english: If we couldn't talk for 1 day, how would you miss me?
quote_tagalog: Bibigat ang araw ko pag wala ka.
quote_english: My day feels heavy without you.

question_tagalog: Anong nagpapangiti sayo pag bad day ka sa work/school?
question_english: What makes you smile when you have a bad day at work/school?
quote_tagalog: Yakap mo yung paborito kong pahinga.
quote_english: Your hug is my favorite rest.

question_tagalog: Pano pag naging sobrang clingy ako sayo forever?
question_english: What if I become super clingy to you forever?
quote_tagalog: Gusto ko yung feeling na kailangan mo ko.
quote_english: I love the feeling that you need me.

question_tagalog: Anong paboritong part mong hawakan sa kamay ko?
question_english: What's your favorite part to hold on my hand?
quote_tagalog: Sakto yung kamay mo sa kamay ko.
quote_english: Your hand fits perfectly in mine.

question_tagalog: Pano mo mapapagaan feeling ko pag nag-failed ako sa isang bagay?
question_english: How will you make me feel better when I fail at something?
quote_tagalog: Dito lang ako, susubok tayo ulit.
quote_english: I'm right here, we'll try again.

question_tagalog: Sigurado ka na ba talaga hanggang sa future natin?
question_english: Are you really sure about our future?
quote_tagalog: Wala na kong ibang nakikita kundi ikaw.
quote_english: I see no one else but you.

question_tagalog: Ano yung gusto mong madalas kong i-remind sayo?
question_english: What do you want me to remind you of often?
quote_tagalog: I-remind mo lang na love mo ko lagi.
quote_english: Just remind me that you always love me.

question_tagalog: Pag ba nahihirapan tayo parehas, susuko na?
question_english: If we both struggle, do we give up?
quote_tagalog: Mas kapit tayo pag mahirap.
quote_english: We hold on tighter when it's hard.

question_tagalog: Ano yung best advice mo pag feeling ko I'm not doing enough?
question_english: What's your best advice when I feel I'm not doing enough?
quote_tagalog: Sapat ka na sakin, sobra-sobra pa.
quote_english: You are enough for me, more than enough.

question_tagalog: Pano mo mapapaalala na special ako kahit busy ka?
question_english: How will you remind me I'm special even when you're busy?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw palagi yung priority ko.
quote_english: You are always my priority.

question_tagalog: Mag-sstay ka ba kahit minsan ang hirap kong intindihin?
question_english: Will you stay even if I'm sometimes hard to understand?
quote_tagalog: Iintindihin kita araw-araw.
quote_english: I will try to understand you every single day.

question_tagalog: Lastly, anong message mo sakin for reassurance ngayon na?
question_english: Lastly, what's your reassurance message for me right now?
quote_tagalog: Mahal kita noon, ngayon, at bukas.
quote_english: I love you yesterday, today, and tomorrow.
